SERVICES
↓

SERVICES

Medical records are written in clinical language not designed for legal interpretation. I translate medical complexity into clear, actionable insight for attorneys.

Merit Reviews

Early-stage case evaluation to assess clinical viability and identify key issues before significant resources are committed.

Comprehensive Case Analysis

In-depth review of medical records with expert identification of deviations from the standard of care.

Chronologies

Clear, structured medical timelines that distill complex clinical events into a coherent narrative attorneys can use.

Medical Record Organization

Systematic sorting, indexing, and categorization of disorganized medical records for efficient case review.

IME / DME Reviews

Objective analysis of independent and defense medical examinations to identify inconsistencies or unsupported conclusions.

Expert Witness Location

Identification of qualified medical expert witnesses whose credentials and experience align with the needs of your case.

ABOUT

Amy Jackson RN, CCRN

Legal Nurse Consultant

With over 11 years of nursing experience across acute and critical care settings, along with board certification in Critical Care Nursing, I bring both clinical depth and real-world perspective to complex medical cases.

I identify deviations from the standard of care, highlight what matters, and clarify the clinical story so you can save time and build a defensible case with confidence.
